svg.title: Simplified pipeline: how all 7 files connect
svg.desc: Clean two-column flowchart showing training pipeline on left, inference pipeline on right, merging into MCMC at the bottom.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does surrogate_config_11d.py export to the rest of the pipeline?')
g.text: bounds · X_TRUE · Y_SIG · masks · DNN settings · SEED

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does run_cloud_11d_six in crm_eval_11d_six.py return?')
sendPrompt('Show me what P_Gaussian in ensemble_da.py computes and how Cholesky decomposition is used')
sendPrompt('How does train_dnn_11d.py train the DNN surrogate?')
sendPrompt('How does dnn_emulator_11d.py load the checkpoint and run predict()?')
sendPrompt('What keys are stored inside dnn11d_model.pt?')
sendPrompt('How does log_prob_dnn11d.py compute the log likelihood?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through mcmc_with_dnn_updated_new.py step by step')
sendPrompt('What is saved in the NetCDF output file?')
sendPrompt('What does the timing output file include?')

svg.text: click any box to explore · arrows show data flow between files
